step_rationale: Acute-phase protein elevated in MI-associated inflammation; shared ischemic stroke and MI signature.
mechanism: LRG1 is an inflammation-responsive acute-phase marker upregulated during plaque inflammation and myocardial ischemia in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Identification of core genes shared by ischemic stroke and myocardial infarction using an integrated approach.
Searching for Novel Candidate Biomarkers of RLS in Blood by Proteomic Analysis.
Serum biomarker discovery related to pathogenesis in acute coronary syndrome by proteomic approach.
Screening and Identification of Pregnancy Zone Protein and Leucine-Rich Alpha-2-Glycoprotein as Potential Serum Biomarkers for Early-Onset Myocardial Infarction using Protein Profile Analysis.
